# spacelift_repos (Data Source)

`spacelift_repos` returns the Spacelift repos in a single space. Repos are not inherited by child spaces, so only repos created directly in the given space are returned.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "spacelift_repos" "this" {
  space_id = "root"
}

output "repos" {
  value = data.spacelift_repos.this.repos
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `space_id` (String) ID (slug) of the space to list repos from

### Optional

- `labels` (Set of String) Required labels to match

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `repos` (List of Object) List of repos in the space (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repos))

<a id="nestedatt--repos"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repos`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (Number)
- `description` (String)
- `labels` (Set of String)
- `name` (String)
- `repo_id` (String)
- `space_id` (String)
- `stacks` (List of String)
- `updated_at` (Number)
- `vcs_checks` (String)
